prestazioni: Replace the stock Ford Sigma 1.6L Duratec Ti-VCT (engine code: *Duratec SCi-16V*) with a fully built *Duratec SCi-16V* featuring a forged crankshaft (Manley 86mm stroke), forged pistons (JE 8.5:1 compression), and billet connecting rods (Carrillo H-beam). Pair with a *Rotrex C38-91 supercharger* (1.5 bar boost) and a *Tial 44mm wastegate* for precise boost control, supported by a *Radium Engineering fuel surge tank* and *ID1000x injectors* for E85 compatibility.

Upgrade the stock Caterham 6-speed sequential gearbox (Quaife ATB differential) with a *Holinger RD6 sequential transmission* (dog-ring engagement, 1000Nm torque capacity) and a *Paddy Hopkirk short-shift kit* for lightning-fast gear changes. Reinforce the drivetrain with a *Quaife LSD* and *Cusco 1.5-way differential* for optimal power delivery.

Install a *KW Suspensions Clubsport 3-way adjustable coilover kit* (24-level rebound, 12-level compression, adjustable ride height) with *Eibach ERS springs* (400 lbs/in front, 350 lbs/in rear) and *SuperPro polybushings* for chassis rigidity. Pair with *AP Racing CP8370-2600 6-piston front calipers* and *CP8371-1800 4-piston rear calipers* clamping *330mm floating rotors* for extreme stopping power.
estetica: Replace the stock fiberglass nosecone with a *Caterham Motorsport carbon fiber front splitter* (3-piece, adjustable angle) and a *RML Group rear diffuser* (carbon-Kevlar hybrid, 3-stage Gurney flap) for downforce optimization. Add *AeroCatch DRS-style quick-release hood latches* for rapid engine access.

Install a *Caterham Motorsport carbon fiber hardtop* (with integrated *Sparco 6-point harness bar*) and *Momo Prototipo 350mm steering wheel* (quick-release hub, Alcantara grip). Replace the stock seats with *Sparco Pro ADV racing seats* (FIA 8862-2009 certified) and *Schroth Profi II 6-point harnesses* for driver security.

Apply a *3M 1080 Gloss Black vinyl wrap* with *RallyArt-style red pinstriping* and *Caterham Motorsport decals* (matte silver, reflective). Add *Hella Rallye 3000 Supertones* (7-inch, H3 55W bulbs) with *custom aluminum mesh grilles* and *OMP LED auxiliary lights* (100W, 6000K) for aggressive track-ready lighting.
